format.description: White (R>=192) = foreground, gray (64<=R<192) = outline, black (R<64) = transparent. Desktop application icons.

resolution.description: Icons resolve by convention: an app named FOO (icon="foo") loads foo.png from this folder. Drop <name>.png here to add an icon; apps without one fall back to default.png. No per-icon index is kept here (the filename is the SSoT).
